hero.name: I'M ALEX
hero.label: Creative Portfolio
hero.description: Content creator & social media strategist with 8+ years of experience turning brands into viral sensations.

paragraphs: I specialize in creating scroll-stopping content for brands that want to dominate social media. From UGC videos to full brand campaigns, I bring a unique blend of creativity and data-driven strategy.
My work has been featured across major platforms, generating millions of views and driving real business results. I don't just create content — I build movements.

items.title: Short Videos
items.desc: Scroll-stopping Reels, TikToks, and Shorts that drive engagement and virality.

items.title: UGC Content
items.desc: Authentic, relatable content that builds trust and converts viewers into customers.

items.title: Brand Strategy
items.desc: Full social media strategy including content calendar, audience growth, and analytics.

items.title: Photo Content
items.desc: High-quality product and lifestyle photography optimized for social media platforms.

work.heading: MY PORTFOLIO
work.description: Swipe through my latest projects. Each one tells a unique story.

contact.heading: LET'S WORK
contact.description: I'm always open to new collaborations and exciting projects. Let's create something amazing together.

marquee.text1: CONTENT CREATOR • SOCIAL MEDIA • BRAND STRATEGY • UGC EXPERT • VIDEO PRODUCTION •
marquee.text2: REELS • TIKTOK • YOUTUBE • INSTAGRAM • BRAND DEALS • VIRAL CONTENT •

textReveal.text: I don't just create content — I build viral movements that make brands unforgettable and turn followers into loyal customers.

items.quote: Alex completely transformed our social media presence. Our engagement went up 400% in just 3 months.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: The viral video Alex created for our launch got 5M views. That's the kind of impact you can't put a price on.
items.name: Marcus Johnson

items.quote: Working with Alex was a game-changer. Professional, creative, and delivers results every single time.
items.name: Elena Rodriguez
